lines.raw: The way to King Street | 去国王街的路

lines.english: Listen to the tape then answer this question.
lines.chinese: 听录音，然后回答这个问题。
lines.raw: Listen to the tape then answer this question. | 听录音，然后回答这个问题。

lines.english: Why did the man need a phrasebook?
lines.chinese: 为什么那个男人需要一本常用语手册？
lines.raw: Why did the man need a phrasebook? | 为什么那个男人需要一本常用语手册？

lines.english: Last week Mrs. Mills went to London.
lines.chinese: 上周，米尔斯夫人去了伦敦。
lines.raw: Last week Mrs. Mills went to London. | 上周，米尔斯夫人去了伦敦。

lines.english: She does not know London very well, and she lost her way.
lines.chinese: 她对伦敦不熟悉，迷路了。
lines.raw: She does not know London very well, and she lost her way. | 她对伦敦不熟悉，迷路了。

lines.english: Suddenly, she saw a man near a bus stop.
lines.chinese: 突然，她看到一个男人在公交车站附近。
lines.raw: Suddenly, she saw a man near a bus stop. | 突然，她看到一个男人在公交车站附近。

lines.english: 'I can ask him the way,' she said to herself.
lines.chinese: “我可以问他路，”她自言自语道。
lines.raw: 'I can ask him the way,' she said to herself. | “我可以问他路，”她自言自语道。
'Excuse me,' she said. | “打扰一下，”她说。

lines.english: 'Can you tell me the way to King Street, please?'
lines.chinese: “请问，你能告诉我国王街怎么走吗？”
lines.raw: 'Can you tell me the way to King Street, please?' | “请问，你能告诉我国王街怎么走吗？”

lines.chinese: 那个男人友好地笑了笑。
lines.raw: The man smiled pleasantly. | 那个男人友好地笑了笑。
He did not understand English! | 他不懂英语！
He spoke German. | 他说德语。
He was a tourist. | 他是一名游客。

lines.english: Then he put his hand into his pocket, and took out a phrasebook.
lines.chinese: 然后他把手伸进口袋，掏出了一本常用语手册。
lines.raw: Then he put his hand into his pocket, and took out a phrasebook. | 然后他把手伸进口袋，掏出了一本常用语手册。

lines.english: He opened the book and found a phrase.
lines.chinese: 他翻开书，找到了一句话。
lines.raw: He opened the book and found a phrase. | 他翻开书，找到了一句话。
He read the phrase slowly. | 他慢慢地读着这句话。
'I am sorry,' he said. | “对不起，”他说。
'I do not speak English.' | “我不会说英语。”
